item.rpg_battle_gear.explosion_sword.too: Explodes on hit, damaging enemies without harming terrain.
item.rpg_battle_gear.flower_sword.toolti: Applies a vine snare. Deals bonus damage to slowed enemies.
item.rpg_battle_gear.ice_sword.tooltip: Chills targets. Extra damage against frozen or slowed enemies.
item.rpg_battle_gear.jewel_sword.tooltip: Builds resonance with each hit. Every third strike releases a radiant shockwave.
item.rpg_battle_gear.lava_sword.tooltip: Builds heat as you strike. Every third hit erupts in fire and knockback.
item.rpg_battle_gear.ocean_sword.tooltip: Builds tide. Every third hit sends out a water wave and grants oceanic speed.
item.rpg_battle_gear.octopus_sword.toolt: Blinds and slows on hit. Every third strike pulls the target toward you in an ink burst.
item.battlegear.seraphim_armor.tooltip: Worn by the celestial warriors of the skies.
tooltip.battlegear.crusader_armor.effect: Wield the Crusader's Aegis, standing resolute against any foe.
tooltip.battlegear.mystic_armor.effect: Clad in the Mystic's Garb, your strikes are imbued with arcane might.
tooltip.battlegear.templar_armor.effect: Don the Armor of Templar, and let swiftness be your ally.
tooltip.battlegear.guardian_armor.effect: Bear the Guardian's Bastion, and fortify your very soul.
tooltip.battlegear.seraphim_armor.effect: Full set grants Wind's Embrace, boosting your agility.
